metadata.original_prompt: search about egypt, create a file called egy_srch.txt continign on the search results

tasks.title: Search the web for information about Egypt
tasks.description: Perform a web search to gather relevant and comprehensive information about Egypt, including historical, cultural, geographical, and modern aspects.

tasks.title: Ask user if they want to save in the default location (~/Downloads/shinobu/) or provide a custom path
tasks.description: Since no file path was specified for 'egy_srch.txt', prompt the user to choose between the default directory or specify a custom location.

tasks.title: Create a file named 'egy_srch.txt' containing the search results
tasks.description: Write the gathered information about Egypt into a text file with the name 'egy_srch.txt' at the chosen location.
